description: Template rules for scanner/control-tower API hardening

rules.name: scanner-protected-endpoints
rules.expression: (http.host eq "oracle-scanner.elfadil.com" and (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/scan") or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/scan-batch") or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/sessions")))

rules.name: portals-control-tower-legacy-auth
rules.expression: (http.host eq "portals.elfadil.com" and starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/control-tower") and not starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/control-tower/summary") and not starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/control-tower/details"))
